social.safeArea: Keep the symbol inside the central 70 percent; verify circular and rounded-square crops.

webHeader.rule: Use the primary horizontal lockup and preserve a quiet descriptor zone.

email.rule: Raster signature is a reference template; production email uses accessible HTML text and linked identity image.

appIcon.masking: The source remains square and opaque; platform masks are applied by the host.

opticalAlignment.rule: Preserve the canonical symbol geometry and outer paper tile; apply only this platform-specific optical translation.

webAd.rule: Keep canonical wordmark separate from headline text and retain the lower verification rule.
